title: Create GET /api/agent/bootstrap/:taskId endpoint + unit test
implementation_notes: Create app/server/api/agent/bootstrap/[taskId].get.ts.
Read the full VaultReadModel via buildVaultReadModel().
Find task by taskId in readModel.tasks — return 404 if not found.
Build and return a BootstrapPack object:
task: { id, title, status, column, priority, assignee, progress, boardId, projectId },
objective: string (task body markdown, first 500 chars max),
acceptanceCriteria: string[] (parse from task body '## Acceptance Criteria' section if present, else []),
constraints: string[] (parse from '## Constraints' section if present, else []),
relatedTasks: Array<{id, title, status}> (same boardId, max 5, exclude the task itself),
pendingApprovals: Array<{id, reason, requestedAt}> (approvals for this taskId),
protocolInstructions: string (static instructions — see implementation_notes below),
approvalPolicy: { required: boolean, reason: string|null }
protocolInstructions static string (embed directly, do not load from file):
'1. You already have this task claimed or are about to claim it. Call POST /api/vault/tasks/{taskId}/claim with your agentId before touching anything.',
'2. Send a heartbeat every 10 minutes: POST /api/vault/tasks/{taskId}/heartbeat.',
'3. If you need a human decision, call POST /api/vault/tasks/{taskId}/request-approval with a reason. Stop work until approved.',
'4. When done, call PATCH /api/vault/tasks/{taskId} with status=done, progress=100, result=<concrete outcome>.',
'5. Do not write directly to vault files. All mutations go through the API.'
Context budget: objective is capped at 500 chars. relatedTasks max 5. No raw body text beyond the objective.
Create app/server/api/agent/bootstrap/[taskId].test.ts:
- mock buildVaultReadModel with seeded task + related tasks
- assert 404 for unknown taskId
- assert protocolInstructions is non-empty string
- assert relatedTasks contains at most 5 items
- assert objective is capped at 500 chars
acceptance_criteria: relatedTasks contains max 5 items from the same board, excluding the task itself.
Unit test covers: happy path, 404, objective truncation, related tasks limit.
bun test passes with no new failures.
completion_summary: Added GET /api/agent/bootstrap/:taskId with bounded bootstrap payload and unit coverage.
